component.name: SLAMForge Desktop
component.summary: Build a sparse 3D map and camera trajectory from monocular video

description.p: SLAMForge Desktop provides a drag-and-drop workflow for running monocular visual SLAM on video without using a command line.

It exports a camera trajectory and sparse PLY map, then displays both in an interactive result viewer. Accurate camera calibration is required, and monocular reconstruction has an unknown absolute scale.
Tracking, optimization, recovery, and loop-closing reliability update.
First public desktop beta for Windows and Linux.
